nasb.text: Your servant is in the midst of Your people which You have chosen, a great people who are too many to be numbered or counted.

esv.text: And your servant is in the midst of your people whom you have chosen, a great people, too many to be numbered or counted for multitude.

cnv.text: 僕人住在你揀選的子民中；這些子民很多，多得不能數算。

ccb.text: 仆人住在你所拣选的子民中，这些子民多得不可胜数。
